_schema.description: About Us page content. Edit any text field here and git push to update the live page. Image paths are relative to the repo root. Manage via _tools/catalog-editor.html (Careers tab) or edit this file directly.

metaDescription: Avana Group is a leading provider of medical devices and solutions, founded in 2009 in Chennai, India. Learn about our mission, vision, values and leadership.

hero.title: Welcome to Avana Surgical Systems!
hero.description: A leading provider of medical devices and solutions, driven by three founding principles: customer focus, medical education, and employee satisfaction.

paragraphs: Avana Group is a leading provider of medical devices and solutions, founded in 2009 in Chennai, India. From the very beginning, the company has been guided by three key principles: customer focus, medical education, and employee satisfaction. These principles have played a crucial role in the company's success and growth.

Since its inception, Avana has seen substantial growth, managing to increase its business by over 30% CAGR. Today, the company has a strong presence across South Asia and continues to expand. In 2018, Avana Group added three more product lines to its portfolio: RIWOspine, Breg Inc, and Aspen Medical Products. This expansion led to the formation of Avana Group as it is known today, with two distinct divisions: Avana Medical Devices Pvt Ltd and Avana Surgical Systems Pvt Ltd.

At Avana Group, we believe that customer focus, medical education, and employee satisfaction are the key drivers of success. We are committed to providing our customers with the highest quality products and services, and to continuously improving our offerings through ongoing research and development. Our team of dedicated professionals is committed to delivering the best possible outcomes for patients and their families.

We are proud of our achievements and look forward to continuing our success and growth in the years to come. If you have any questions or would like to learn more about Avana Group, please don't hesitate to contact us.

testimonials.name: Aaqib Perwez
testimonials.quote:
My journey with Avana Surgical Systems has been truly transformational, both professionally and personally. Being associated with an organization that is committed to improving patients' quality of life through innovative orthopaedic and rehabilitation solutions gives me immense pride every single day.

What makes Avana Surgical Systems different is its strong focus on patient recovery, medical education, and customer-centric service. The company's partnership with globally recognized brands like Breg and Aspen has helped us deliver premium post-operative and rehabilitation solutions to patients and healthcare professionals across India.

As a Sales Manager (West India), I have witnessed how the right bracing and rehabilitation support can genuinely change patient outcomes after surgery. Surgery is only the beginning — the real recovery journey starts afterward, and Avana's products play a crucial role in helping patients regain confidence, mobility, and comfort during rehabilitation.

The organization has also given me an excellent platform to grow professionally by encouraging ownership, learning, relationship-building, and market development. The support from leadership, the collaborative work culture, and the shared vision of transforming lives through innovative medical solutions continue to inspire me every day.

I am proud to be part of a company that is not only growing rapidly in the orthopedic industry but is also making a meaningful impact on patients, surgeons, and healthcare systems across the country.

cta.title: Want to be part of the Avana story?
cta.description: We are always looking for passionate professionals who want to make a difference in orthopaedic care across India.
